title: × alcalthaea suffrutescens
intro: × Alcalthaea suffrutescens, also known as the False Hellebore, is a plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of × Alcalthaea suffrutescens include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be cautious and under the guidance of a medical professional due to its toxicity.
